tasks.title: System health check — verify orchestrator/dashboard/agents running
tasks.description: Verify all runtime components are operational: orchestrator/main.py, dashboard server, agents, watchdog, cron jobs
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 checks pass, results in reports/system_health.json

projects.name: Dashboard Quality & State Management
projects.description: Fix missing state fields and implement schema validation

tasks.title: Fix dashboard state — implement missing quality/model fields
tasks.description: Implement schema validation for dashboard/state.json. Add defaults for missing fields: quality, model, recent_tasks, changelog, research_feed
tasks.success_criteria: All required fields present on every write, no null/empty values

projects.name: Policy Enforcement & Budget Control
projects.description: Wire token/rescue budget limits and model routing

tasks.title: Policy enforcement — wire token/rescue budget limits
tasks.description: Implement token_enforcer.py, rescue_enforcer.py, update providers/router.py to enforce 10% token budget and model routing rules
tasks.success_criteria: Budget enforced, all decisions logged to reports/policy_enforcement.jsonl

projects.name: Multi-Loop Execution & Self-Improvement
projects.description: Implement DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve for multi-pass execution

tasks.title: Optimize multi-loop execution — DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve
tasks.description: Wire DAG dependency tracking, parallel task execution, semantic memory, and self-improvement loop into orchestrator/continuous_loop.py
tasks.success_criteria: Multi-pass loops (2-3 passes/session), parallel execution active, self-improvement running every 50 tasks

projects.name: Local Agent Autonomy Setup
projects.description: Set up routing and task dispatch for fully autonomous execution

tasks.title: Set up local agent handoff — document all work for agents/__init__.py router
tasks.description: Verify agents/__init__.py router picks up tasks from projects.json, update projects.json with all 5 tasks, prepare for autonomous execution
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 tasks listed in projects.json, agents/__init__.py routes tasks correctly, orchestrator --auto 5 executes all

projects.name: FIRST_PAYING_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_TRACK
projects.description: Separate revenue-track project for demo, GTM and first paying customer (isolated from infra work)

tasks.title: Audit existing assets for revenue reuse
tasks.description: Find and assess existing CLI flows, dashboard views, demo flows, QA automation, GTM/docs. Mark each as reuse/improve/ignore. Show findings on dashboard.
tasks.success_criteria: Asset audit report in reports/revenue_asset_audit.json with reuse/improve/ignore flags for each

tasks.title: Define exact 3-minute demo flow and happy path
tasks.description: Define exact demo CLI command, expected output, proof points shown on dashboard, acceptance test criteria. Reuse existing CLI commands where possible.
tasks.success_criteria: Demo flow spec in reports/demo_happy_path.json with exact commands, outputs, proof points, acceptance tests

tasks.title: Verify CLI MVP works for demo (install, run, output)
tasks.description: Verify nexus install flow, one-command run, project input, output artifacts, error messaging. Update README with working demo commands.
tasks.success_criteria: CLI demo command works end-to-end, proof in reports/cli_demo_test.json, README updated with example

tasks.title: Verify dashboard truth for revenue-track (live state, tasks, proof, CTA)
tasks.description: Verify live state writer, task counts, owners, active agent, blockers, PR state, readiness score, empty/error states, websocket updates, paid pilot CTA visibility
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard shows revenue-track readiness score, paid pilot CTA, all required sections working. Test in reports/dashboard_truth_test.json

tasks.title: Capture demo proof (before/after, sample project, screenshot, value explanation)
tasks.description: Run exact demo command, capture output artifacts, create before/after comparison, produce sample repo path, screenshot proof, customer-facing value explanation, 'why this matters' section
tasks.success_criteria: Demo proof artifacts in reports/demo_proof_artifacts/ with before/after, sample repo, screenshots, value_explanation.md

tasks.title: Create paid pilot offer (scope, pricing, CTA, success metric, timeline)
tasks.description: Create paid pilot offer copy, scope, success metric, time box, pricing recommendation, CTA, objection handling. Reuse sales-outreach skill.
tasks.success_criteria: Paid pilot offer spec in reports/paid_pilot_offer.md with scope, pricing, CTA, objection handling

tasks.title: Create GTM assets (Reddit post, landing copy, demo script, outreach, FAQ)
tasks.description: Create Reddit launch post, short landing page copy, demo script, outreach/DM note, FAQ from objections, one founder post and one technical post. Reuse generate-marketing-plan skill.
tasks.success_criteria: All GTM assets in reports/gtm_assets/ (reddit_post.md, landing_copy.md, demo_script.md, outreach_note.md, faq.md, founder_post.md, technical_post.md)

tasks.title: Interactive QA 10x pass: validate full user journey CLI→dashboard→task→proof→CTA
tasks.description: Run 10 real user journeys: install, demo run, dashboard view, task creation, task assignment, task pickup, completion, proof visibility, paid pilot CTA. Log every failure. Do not claim ready until all 10 passes succeed.
tasks.success_criteria: 10 consecutive successful user journeys logged in reports/qa_10x_passes.json. All flows verified: CLI, dashboard, task assignment, proof, CTA.

tasks.title: Define conversion readiness (ICP, pain, value metric, trial path, follow-up, first call prep)
tasks.description: Define ICP (ideal customer profile), pain solved in plain English, value metric, trial/pilot path, call-to-action flow, follow-up sequence, what to show in first call
tasks.success_criteria: Conversion readiness spec in reports/conversion_readiness.md with ICP, pain statement, value metric, trial path, CTA flow, follow-up sequence

epics.name: Infra Epic #1: System Health & Reliability
epics.mission: Beat Opus 4.6 with 90% local / 10% Claude rescue

epics.name: EPIC 2: FIRST_PAYING_CUSTOMER_REVENUE_TRACK
epics.mission: Ship demo → first paying customer fast without breaking infra

tracks.infrastructure: System health, dashboard, policy, execution, autonomy
tracks.revenue: Demo, GTM, paid pilot, first customer conversion
